label: The Null Cantina Cellar
description: The Null Cantina Cellar serves as the cantina’s secured storage volume, cut into the glass-dark composite behind the bar and scored with the Anchorage’s repeating cell-grids. Rectilinear filament conduits run exposed along the ceiling, their hard-edged light segmenting shelving bays into strict, numbered intervals. Racks of sealed casks and vacuum-rated lockers stand in recessed niches, while a matte lattice floor drains condensation into a narrow service trench. A single inspection pane of smoked crystal faces the axial spine’s glow, admitting measured light without compromising the room’s controlled dark.
